channel.title: SeaVigil alerts
channel.description: New high-severity illegal-fishing leads: foreign or unauthorized vessels going dark or transshipping, from Global Fishing Watch events.

item.title: ais_disabling: IRL in Australian Exclusive Economic Zone
item.description: KAYBEANNA 8-99% (IRL), foreign vessel, no authorization on record. Authorization: no_record. Event time 2026-06-25T15:46:04.000Z.
